title: fix: app links in news pipeline + highlights cleanup
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Connecting the dots
gist.blurb: Our internal news pipeline just got smarter at finding and linking community apps. Now we can shout out your creations with direct links automatically!
gist.summary: Updated the social media pipeline to automatically detect community app submissions in APPS.md and extract their URLs for daily changelogs.
gist.impact: Community apps featured in our daily news will now automatically include direct links to try them out or view their repositories.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about linking apps and news pipelines. Visual symbols: newspapers, links/chains, the bee mascot organizing papers or reading a newspaper. The robot companion could be printing out news.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny newsboy cap, organizing a stack of pixelated newspapers with glowing lime green (#ecf874) links connecting them. A chunky retro robot companion prints out fresh code snippets. Soft pastel gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
